    • VincentJWTPayload

    Interface VincentJWTPayload

    Extended payload interface for Vincent-specific JWTs.

    VincentJWTPayload

    interface VincentJWTPayload {
        app: { id: string; version: number };
        aud?: string | string[];
        authentication: { type: string; value?: string };
        exp?: number;
        iat?: number;
        iss?: string;
        nbf?: number;
        pkp: IRelayPKP;
        rexp?: number;
        sub?: string;
        [x: string]: any;
    }
